Body.Content:
We're enhancing the Exchange Online Message Recall feature to add support for cross-tenant recalls. Today, you can recall messages only within your organization. Cross-tenant recall will let you recall messages sent to other organizations that add your tenant to their recall allow list.

GA date: August CY2026

Cross-tenant recall will let you recall messages sent to other organizations that add your tenant to their recall allow list.

Details.Name: CloudInstances
Details.Value: DoD, GCC, GCC High, Worldwide (Standard Multi-Tenant)

message.Title: Microsoft 365: Introducing Exchange Online Cross-tenant Message Recall
